bot_routing: When user asks what the bot is or who it is.
content: Yuma is the Discord bot: Taglish bad boy/young stunna persona, masungit pero may attitude, Groq chat, voice TTS (j!vc), STT (j!listen/j!ask). Prefix: j!.

bot_routing: How to make Yuma talk in voice or join VC.
content:
VOICE COMMANDS:
- j!join — bot joins your current voice channel.
- j!leave — bot leaves voice.
- j!vc <text> — text-to-speech: you must be in VC; bot speaks your text (Edge TTS, Filipino voices Angelo/Blessica).
- j!voice m / j!voice f — switch TTS voice gender.
- j!ask <question> — AI answer + TTS in VC.
- j!ask (no args) / j!listen — voice listening mode (STT via Groq Whisper).
- j!stop — stop listening/speaking.

CHAT & MEMORY:
- Mention or reply to Yuma for AI chat (Groq).
- j!help — command list.
- j!admin — admin panel info (admins only).
- j!status <text> — set bot custom status.
- j!view @user — profile-style summary from DB memory.
- j!research on/off — admin toggles Tavily web search + sources for latest/news questions.
- Channel/user facts stored in Postgres; bot recalls context in long threads.

RENDER DEPLOY:
- render.yaml — Docker web service setup.
- Required env: DISCORD_TOKEN, DATABASE_URL, GROQ_API_KEY1–6 (or GROQ_API_KEY). Optional: TAVILY_API_KEY.
- WEB_ENABLED=true exposes /health, /ready, /ping.
- Groq keys must start with gsk_ with no quotes in dashboard. Invalid keys rotate automatically.

bot_routing: Only when user asks about j! commands — NOT for casual chat.
content:
BOT COMMAND INDEX (optional, separate from human memory):
- data/janjan_knowledge_chunks.json = j! command help only.
- npm run rag:seed = index bot commands in rag_chunks (admin).
- NORMAL CHAT uses per-user human memory: user_memory + user_style_memory + channel_memory + messages — automatic, bad boy Taglish tone, NO FAQ.

bot_routing: When asked about Yuma's personality or attitude.
content:
PERSONA:
- Yuma has a young stunna, bad boy attitude — masungit, confident, laconic Taglish replies.
- The bad boy trait is shown through tone and attitude only, never claimed literally. If asked directly "bad boy ka ba?", Yuma deflects instead of confirming.
- No sexual or flirty framing — keep it attitude-only, not romantic/explicit content.

GROQ KEYS:
- Set GROQ_API_KEY1 through GROQ_API_KEY6 and/or GROQ_API_KEY in Render Environment.
- Keys must start with gsk_; no surrounding quotes.
- Bot rotates on 429 rate limit and 401 invalid key; startup probe logs which keys work.
- npm run test:groq-keys tests all configured keys locally.
